sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and try UP
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Player position: {blue_player[0]['boundary']}")

# Check area above player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAbove player (rows 18-26, cols 12-28):")
for i in range(18, 27):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][12:28]}")

# Try UP
action(['UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
